# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any  // Runs on master node
    
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn clean install'  // Assumes Maven for build
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn test'   // Run tests using Maven
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when { expression { env.BRANCH_NAME == 'master' }}  // Deploys only from master branch
            steps {
                sh 'mvn deploy -Pproduction'   // Deployment profile
            }
        }
    }
}
